arts.ttl: Real Madrid close gap on Barcelona with Alaves win as Kylian Mbappe sees red
arts.sum: Real are four points behind leaders Barca.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick considers calling up Barcelona youngster after Balde injury
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick is giving consideration to affording a first-team call-up to an up-and-coming member of the club’s defensive ranks. That’s according to journalist Moisés Llorens, who points towards…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick admits he celebrated Barcelona star’s ‘incredible’ intervention ‘like a goal’
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has moved to reveal his appreciation for the latest efforts put forth by Iñigo Martínez. This comes owing to a moment of defensive excellence on…

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Real Madrid scheduled for May 11
arts.sum: The potentially title-deciding Clásico between Barcelona and Real Madrid at the Olympic Stadium has been scheduled for May 11.
